title: Cosine $$\frac{sum}{difference}$$ formulas
text: Recall that \cos(A+B) $$=$$ cosAcosB - sinAsinB and $$\cos(A-B)$$ $$=$$ cosAcosB + sinAsinB.

title: Introduce tangent terms
text: To transform the expression into terms involving tan(a)tan(b), divide every term in the numerator and denominator by $$\cos(a)\cos(B).$$

title: Simplify to tangent form
text: Use the identity tan(x) $$=$$ \sin(x)/\cos(x) to simplify the expression.
